div.class: absolute right-0 top-full hidden w-60 pt-1 group-hover:block
rounded border border-mercury bg-white p-3 text-xs font-normal text-black
div.p: How search works in the Security Help Center:

ul.li: The most relevant topics (based on weighting and matching to search terms) are listed first in the search results by default
Use double quotes to find a phrase (“specific phrase”)
Apply facets on the Search Results page to further scope search results by category

div.class: hidden absolute border-1 top-10 mt-4 mb-5 ml-5 mr-0 right-0 min-w-72 pt-4 pl-4 pr-3 group z-30
card pt-3 pr-4 pl-4 rounded-md border-apple border-4 shadow-2xl

p.strong: Log In to the Cisco Security Documentation Portal

div.class: flex flex-row mb-6 justify-between align-middle items-center

select.name: account
select.class: bg-white focus:ring-cornflower ring-2 w-2/3 text-ship-grey text-lg

button.class: button w-full sm:w-auto border-0 hover:bg-white hover:text-ship-grey transition-all
button w-full sm:w-auto bg-primary border-primary text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-primary transition-all

div.class: mb-2 rounded-md bg-white px-8 py-6 shadow-lg h-full
absolute mt-1 lg:relative lg:flex lg:h-full lg:flex-col

a.class: mx-1 hidden text-sm font-normal text-ship-grey lg:inline-block

div.class: border-1 absolute -left-4 z-10 hidden min-w-72 rounded-md border-mercury bg-white p-4 shadow-md lg:static lg:block lg:min-w-0 lg:rounded-none lg:border-0 lg:p-0 lg:shadow-none
